title: Stepson Stole My Condo And Called Me A Gambler. So I Watched Him Auction His Mom's Diamonds.
description: My stepson forged a power of attorney, drained my condo's equity, and convinced everyone I had a gambling problem. I uncovered his fraud, got his real estate license revoked, and when the court forced him to auction his late mother's diamond jewelry, I showed up and bought the whole collection for $28,000. Reselling it for $130,000 let me buy a better condo two doors down from the one he sold. #Revenge #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: HE AUCTIONED HIS MOTHER'S DIAMONDS, I BOUGHT EVERY PIECE

thumb_lines.text: COURT FORCED HIM TO SELL HIS LATE MOTHER'S DIAMONDS
